rationale: Review 1 correctly identifies two real naming defects confirmed in the diff: snake_case fields (`unipotent_radical_trivial`, `radical_trivial`) inconsistent with camelCase sibling fields (`finiteType`, `geomReduced`), and `ReductiveGroup.unipotentRadical_trivial'` mixing conventions and adding a gratuitous prime. Review 2 misses both, so acting on it leaves the PR with genuine style violations.
